modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Ethernet port on Cisco device in dorm room not functioning

full_description_text:  
The far-left wired network port on the Cisco device in my dorm room isn't working. I plugged into the port, but it doesn't seem to work at all. The Ethernet port under the QR Code on the device is not functioning as expected.
short_description: Ethernet port on Cisco device in dorm room not functioning
description: The far-left wired network port on the Cisco device in my dorm room isn't working. I plugged into the port, but it doesn't seem to work at all. The Ethernet port under the QR Code on the device is not functioning as expected.
